title: Behr Paint Company Announces Its 2024 Color of the Year, "Cracked Pepper," A Soft Black that Exudes Confidence and Instantly Elevates any Indoor and Outdoor Space
text: New Study Conducted by Behr Paint Shows More Than Half of Americans Believe Black Tones in the Home Create a New Energy and Vibe and Make a Space Feel Bold SANTA ANA, Calif. , Aug. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Behr Paint Company announces its 2024 Color of the Year, Cracked Pepper (PPU18-01), a timeless and modern hue that awakens the senses and exudes confidence on every scale.
